accent.usage: Selection, focus reinforcement, and primary send-style actions.

panel-bg.usage: Sidebar, composer, popover, and settings surfaces.

warning.usage: Permission requests, blocked states, and caution copy.

body.purpose: Chat prose, composer text, and settings descriptions.

mono.purpose: Paths, commands, terminal output, counters, and diff-like content.

rules: Prefer VS Code tokens in implementation; fallback colors are for standalone development only.
Accent is signal, not decoration; keep it under 10% of any screen.
Use tonal layering and one-pixel borders instead of decorative shadows.
Chat is the primary surface; it should feel like agent chat with folded tool activity, not logs.
Minimalism is the main design constraint; every visible section must earn its place.
Runtime health, diagnostics, and telemetry details live in Settings, not in the sidebar.
No side-stripe borders, gradient text, glassmorphism, nested cards, or decorative motion.
